acceptanceCriteria: The final tree (round 1 implementation plus review remediation) passes all required repository verification
rigor consult-decide persists each independent-review decision as an append-only review-decisions artifact including its input hash, --dry-run writes nothing, and the selector stays pure
The persisted artifact validates against independent-review-decision.v1 and a test now asserts schema conformance and the UUID-suffixed filename
Decisions remain advisory (approvalEffect none) with no verification/review/CI linkage; exit codes unchanged
README no longer overstates command-level purity
constraints: No runtime behavior change relative to round 1
Keep selectConsultation pure; persistence only in the CLI layer
No external transmission beyond the completed bounded Codex review
Do not weaken or skip tests
stopConditions: a required check fails twice without a new hypothesis
